title: Rocks and Pebbles
description: Bring life to your world, by adding naturally spawning rocks and pebbles
body:
Rocks and pebbles adds various types of naturally spawning rocks and pebbles to your world to make it feel more alive.

Naturally spawning rocks and pebbles come in 6 types that include:
- Stone
- Andesite
- Diorite
- Granite
- Sandstone
- Red sandstone

Different types of rocks and pebbles spawn in different biomes, for example:
- Deserts have less stone and underground rocks but more sandstone.
- Beaches have various types of rock with a mix of sandstone.
- Badlands have less stony rocks but more red sandstone.
- The rest of the world contains a mix of rocks like stone and andesite.

Furthermore, rocks and pebbles spawn most abundatly on riverbeds and shores, and contain a mix of rocks like sandstone and stone. 

Additionally you can place rocks and pebbles on top of water to create steppings stones, which you can walk on. They also come with a little animation, its really fancy!

**All 6 types of rock side by side:**
![All 6 rocks side by side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ca41ff0e292ec3cab58815e5f80ecdddf253bc.png)


**A beach of rocks:**

![A beach of rocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f027d63d72161da200b67cc499fd34aeedbdd753.png)


**Stepping stones:**
 ![Stepping Stones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3366fc82e55225502a71e824f9c7762d8e59bf3d.png)


# Dependencies:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
